name: Bitmagnet
description: Self-hosted BitTorrent indexer and DHT crawler
compose:
name: slashnode-bitmagnet
services:
  bitmagnet:
    image: ghcr.io/bitmagnet-io/bitmagnet:v0.10.0
    container_name: bitmagnet-bitmagnet
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - worker
      - run
      - '--keys=http_server'
      - '--keys=queue_server'
      - '--keys=dht_crawler'
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      HOME: /tmp
      XDG_CONFIG_HOME: /config
      POSTGRES_HOST: bitmagnet-postgres
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      POSTGRES_NAME: bitmagnet
    volumes:
      - bitmagnet_data-config:/config/bitmagnet
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3335:3333
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: bitmagnet-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      POSTGRES_DB: bitmagnet
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      PGUSER: postgres
    volumes:
      - postgres_data-postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  bitmagnet_data-config:
    name: slashnode-bitmagnet_bitmagnet_data-config
  postgres_data-postgres:
    name: slashnode-bitmagnet_postgres_data-postgres
